name: Nutty Brussels Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the Brussels sprouts and trim off the bottoms of the stems and any loose leaves.
2. Steam the sprouts over boiling water until they are tender, about 7 to 10 minutes.
3. Remove the sprouts from the pot and transfer them to a serving bowl.
4. Stir in the olive oil, nuts, and cardamom.
5. Food Exchange per serving: 1 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 62; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 9.1g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 22mg; FAT: 3g
